feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS View - Custom report
entry.content:
Dear Team, I am posting this on behalf of Partner that I am working with.

Customers do have a requirement to build a new report for the sales register. We require all the sales transactions, including Commercial Invoice (F2), credit notes, debit notes, and cancellations. We are currently facing issues identifying a document flow CDS for credit (CBAR) and CR documents. Can you suggest which CDS we can use for the document flow update of both credit and debit documents?

Regards

Pallavi Chand Shree

pallavi.chand.shree@sap.com

entry.title: Currently we are trying to migrate the data from other ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud 2402
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Currently we are trying to migrate the data from Non SAP ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud. We are facing the challenges regarding the G/l account migration. Our client opt for :-

1) Changing the account groups from the standard to user specific. For example changing the existing the balance sheet account group ABST(Standard) to CURA(Current assets),CURL(Current liabilities).

2)After that Mapping the existing standard G/L's with the client G/L's and adding the additional g/l's

3) Re - numbering of the G/L accounts and adding the additional g/l accounts

->The challenges we are facing is that, We need to create so many g/l accounts so is there any mass upload process available for the upload of g/l accounts in the public cloud 2402?

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP General Ledger Migration 

We have planned to follow below process please suggest the best process to meet the above requirements :- 

 

1copy the existing configuration of g/l's 
2Create New g/l account groups and transfer the existing data to that new account groups 
3Create additional vendor and customer account groups and recon accounts for that account groups as per the client requirement 
4Create additional bank incoming , outgoing , main bank account for house banks  as per the client requirement 
5do the renumbering 
6

create new g/l's that are not suitable with the pre delivered g/l's

entry.title: How to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?
entry.content:
We're trying to "Integrate CDS Views Using SAP Datasphere" to S4HANA2402. But we're stuck in one of the prerequisites - "You have created at least one authorization group ID with a CDS view allowlist. (To do so, proceed as follows: In your configuration environment, use the search function to open the following activity: Define Allowlists for CDS View Extraction.  When creating the communication arrangement, the communication user is assigned to an authorization group. CDS views that are not part of this authorization group will not be visible in in the CDS_EXTRACTION folder (the folder that is used to add source objects to a replication flow)".

the below link does not help "https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-create-an-authorization-group-for-quot-define-allowlists-for-cds/qaq-p/12664365ommunity".

Please help where and how to create Authorization Group ID to define allowlists for CDS View Extraction in S4HANA 2402?

Thanks

Salman

entry.title: ABC Analysis for Cycle Counting
entry.content:
Hi 

We need to assign ABC cycle count codes to our material automatically, I understand that we can do this using ABC Analysis app. But I don't seems to find this app. we are S/4HANA Public Cloud with base Inventory module (not extended Warehouse Management). My question do we need EWM to run ABC Analysis or if there is another app we can use to assign ABC code to materials.

 

Thanks a lot for your help!

Ashraf

S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: How can we get details like Created By and Created On for CDS Views, Tables - in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for information like Created By or Last Modify By  & Created On or Last modified On for CDS Views and Tables on S/4HANA Public Cloud. Please let me know if we have any APIs to get those details.

Thanks,

Sreedhar R

entry.title: IRM Restriction on FSV - Different behavior with Define FSV in Global Hierarchies
entry.content:
Hello,

I have actually two questions for which I was not able to find any input and related to same feature : Manage FSV in Global Hierarchies

  1. I did not find any information regarding Migrate FSV to Global Hierarchies deprecation in R2402, is this expected and documented? Looking at the documentation, it is still visible but the feature and configuration activity seems to have disappeared in CBC
  2. Also, we are facing new challenges related to business role restriction in which FSV restriction does not behave similarly when FSVs are created through Manage Financial Statement Version app (FSV visible in restriction) or Manage FSV in Global Hierarchies (FSV missing in Restriction).

Any help on that would be much appreciated.

Best Regards,

Romain

entry.title: Set Initialize Value for Purchase Order in S4HANA
entry.content:
I would like to initialize values for custom fields in this BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PO_INITIALIZE.

But I can't call the custom fields in this BAdI. Is there any ways to call custom fields in this BAdI?

entry.title: Posting acquisitions on OIM account
entry.content:
Dear Community,

During release 2402 the app Post Acquisition(Integrated AP) –Without Purchase Order (F-90) has been removed and replaced by MIRO and Post Asset Acquisition– And Quantity Adjustment.

Before that change we were able to post acquisition: DT: asset / CT: Gl account (open item managed)

Currently this posting is not possible because Post Asset Acquisition– And Quantity Adjustment requires account which are not OIM

Do you know if there is any other possibility to make this booking? via different app?

Thanks,

Kamil

entry.title: To understand the usage and scenario coverage of scope ID MV and 4X8- Cash application
entry.content:
Hi,

 

SAP S4 HANA Cloud

 

We intend to understand the usage and scenario coverage of scope ID MV and 4X8- Cash application Automation using ML-AI.

 

We encounter multiple scenarios wherein the customer shares inadequate information- no invoice number/name/ identification thereby making it difficult to match it to the original invoice. Will this scenario see an improvement with the activation of the said scope IDs? We also have scenarios involving bank fees or forex leading to mismatch of amounts along with no identifier within the memo line. What would be the success rate of matching such cases using ML -AI?

 

We would also want to refer to documentation on 1MV and 4X8, The links mentioned below do not seem to load since the past few days.

 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implement-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-for-treasury-management/using-the-sap-cash-application-1mv-_d67161db-5c5e-4217-90df-5a8839022e90

 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/implement-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-for-treasury-management/outlining-automated-bank-statement-processing-4x8-_e8284f42-f1a0-424b-bf95-0bac4737d3ae

 

Any leads appreciated. Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: Sales group can't change name via APP: Manage your solution
entry.content:
When you use SSCUI:105998 maintain sales group, and met below issue:

You don't have the authorization to change the data (only display)

entry.title: No alternative payer/payee defined when create billing with one-time customer
entry.content:
when create billing with one-time customer faced below issues:

No alternative payer/payee defined

entry.title: Its possible the Cross Plant maintenance company in s/4hana cloud Public?
entry.content:
​
 
 
 
 
 
 
909 / 5.000
 

Resultados de traducción

Resultado de traducción

Hi everyone,
I have a cross maintenance scenario (country Chile) where there are 3 company codes (in the same CO company) with their respective maintenance plants.
One of these companies is the one who performs the maintenance work for all the other companies.
For example, if company code 1 is the one that performs the maintenance work for all companies, the assignment of the planning plant would look like this:
Company code 1 = Maintenance plant 1 = Planning plant 1
Company code 2 = Maintenance plant 2 = Planning plant 1
Company code 3 = Maintenance plant 3 = Planning plant 1
Is this scenario possible in S/4hana cloud Public?
In this case, in the configuration, the planning plant for all companies would be the code of the plant that performs the maintenance?
At the accounting level, in which company would the maintenance expenses be reflected?
Is there a link with information on this scenario?
 
Thanks in advance

entry.title: Please tell me about Reset Transaction Data.
entry.content:
I am currently migrating BS balance data on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, but there was an error in the migrated data, so I would like to delete the data and try again.

I believe that transaction data can be deleted by using the application in the subject line, but is it possible?
If it can be deleted, please let me know if there are any points to be careful about, such as master data being deleted along with it.

entry.title: Copy sales order to sales order with reference in S4 HANA Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

We can able to copy the order by using of 'create with references' options like below

- Create from Quotation

- Create from Contract

But how to enable the option of 'Create from Order' ?

For reference, please see the attachment.

Any idea? Please guide us.

Thanks.

entry.title: Payment Medium Formats Country Chile - S/4Hana Public
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to know and confirm if inside the Chile localization, there are payment forms for banks, for example BANCO BCI, BANCO SANTANDER, BANCO ITAU.

If the answers are not positive, is there any guide to create these formats?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Connect SAP BAS to SAP Public Cloud Problem
entry.content:
I try to connect BAS to Public Cloud follow step tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-bas-connect-s4hc.html

The difference is my domain is xxx.sap.cloud and in tutorial is ondemand.com . But when I check Destination Connection in BAS, I got error  Unauthorized to access v4 catalog service, Unauthorized to access v2 catalog service. How can I fix it?

Thanks very much,

entry.title: SAP Transportation Management public Cloud
entry.content:
We want to create different freight unit number ranges for the respective plants at the customer's 2 plants.
Is SAP TM in the public cloud limited to the one existing number range or where can we maintain an alternative?
Greetings
Bastian

entry.title: BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM was not triggering.
entry.content:
I have written some validation logic for order data in item level using BADI  : SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM and also checked in SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE also but its not working,

For header level BADI is working fine, but facing problem with Item level.

Could you please suggest for above issue.

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use a S4 HANA Public Cloud remote API within S4 HANA Cloud ABAP environment itself instead of SAP BTP ABAP environment, If I don't have any local api available. How to set up the communication scenario if the use of remote api is possible within S4 HANA Cloud itself?

Thanks,

Siva

entry.title: Treasury and Risk Management for Public Cloud TDD System
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

Could you please assist how can Treasury component FIN-FSCM-TRM-CNT be activated on a existing TDD system?
In the Partner' pricing app, under TDD, no available option exist to add this component as an additional licence. Does it mean no demo system exist for TRM?

Best regards,
Aleks
